CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String);
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (0, 'North America'), (1, 'South America'), (2, 'Europe'), (3, 'Asia'), (4, 'Africa'), (5, 'Australia');
SELECT regionToName(0, 'en') AS region_name FROM numbers(1);
SELECT regionToName(6, 'en') AS region_name FROM numbers(1);
SELECT regionToName(id, 'fr') FROM regions WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
CREATE TABLE additional_regions (id UInt32, name String, lang String);
INSERT INTO additional_regions VALUES (1, 'Amérique du Sud', 'fr'), (2, 'Europe', 'fr'), (3, 'Asie', 'fr');
SELECT r.name, regionToName(r.id, r.lang) FROM additional_regions AS r JOIN regions AS rg ON r.id = rg.id;
WITH (SELECT regionToName(id, 'de') FROM regions WHERE id = 2) AS region_german_name SELECT region_german_name;
SELECT regionToName(id, 'en') FROM regions WHERE id = 100 UNION ALL SELECT regionToName(id, 'en') FROM regions WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regionToName(CAST(number AS UInt32), 'en') FROM numbers(0, 10);
SELECT count(*) FROM regions WHERE regionToName(id, 'en') != '';
SELECT DISTINCT regionToName(id, 'es') AS region_spanish_name FROM regions; SELECT count(*) FROM additional_regions WHERE name LIKE '%Amérique%';
SELECT regionToName(1, 'it') AS italian_name, regionToName(3, 'pt') AS portuguese_name FROM regions;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE id <= 5 HAVING regionToName(id, 'en') != '';
